p.em: Mode isolation invariant: no nested mode transitions

ol.li: If EOF → emit ERROR, return to NORMAL
If char ∉ {n, t, r, ", \} → emit ERROR for 2-char sequence, stay in IN_STRING (error recovery)

div.p: " consumed by advance() _begin_token() already called token_start_* = " position
unescaped " consumed → emit STRING(lexeme=source[start:current]) lexeme includes both quote chars
\n consumed OR EOF → emit ERROR at token_start_* scanning resumes on next line
\n peeked (NOT consumed) OR EOF → emit no token \n left for main loop whitespace handler
*/ consumed peek * → advance(), peek / → advance() → emit no token
EOF before */ → emit ERROR at opening / position (token_start_line, token_start_column)
